modules.module: Global CSS defining Stilled brand typography, color palette, animations, and utility classes.
Reusable React and Astro UI components (CursorMask, Navigation).
HTML shell and common page structure.
Static and dynamic Astro pages serving the public Stilled site.

decisions.decision: Using Astro for static site generation of the public-facing Stilled pages, completely separate from the Observatory app.
Frontend styling adheres strictly to STILLED_BRAND.md rules (warm alabaster, Inter/Cormorant, no gamification).
Critical pages (counsel, theories) currently rely on mock JS files or disabled placeholders, pending Ghost Content API integration.
React used sparingly for specific interactive components (CursorMask) via Astro's client directives.

completed.task: Base Astro project scaffolding.
Global CSS implementation matching STILLED_BRAND.md specifications.
Core navigation and layout structure.
Landing page (index.astro) with background video and frosted glass cursor mask.
Home (Sanctum) page structure.
Directory page with interactive cursor-following image hover effect.
Artifacts page with alternating grid layout.
Theories index page mapping mock data.
Theories dynamic routing ([slug].astro) with sticky left-column and intersection observer for prose.
Refactored home.astro with CSS grid, fluid typography clamp() and semantic editorial layout.
Enabled IntersectionObserver smooth scroll reveal tracking globally via Layout.astro.
Refactored Navigation for flexible wrapping at mobile widths (390px).
Improvement 1: ViewTransitions / ClientRouter + transition:persist on CursorMask.
Improvement 2: CursorMask touch degradation logic established.
Improvement 3: Navigation mobile overflow fix via flexbox.
Improvement 4: IntersectionObserver + clamp() spacing injected globally.
Improvement 5: Fluid spacing layout applied to home.astro.
Resolved mobile QA FIX 1 & 2: Added frosted glass overlay to Navigation to prevent text overlap, and scaled links to fit one line on 320px+ viewports.
Resolved mobile QA FIX 3 & 4: Bound Astro ViewTransitions correctly to Layout and fixed CSS specificity hiding .animate-on-scroll logic.
Resolved mobile QA FIX 6: Squelched default iOS blue tap highlights on Directory items.
Resolved mobile QA FIX 7 & 8: Appended base html background #FAF9F6, replaced broken YouTube iframes with Stilled branding UI placeholders.
Philosopher portraits integrated (dostoevsky, laozi, nietzsche) via mix-blend-mode targeting scroll zones.

in_progress.task: Awaiting Ghost Content API integration to replace mock data.

next_up.task: Wire up `src/data/syntheses.js` equivalents to Ghost Content API.

blocked_on.dependency: Ghost Content API keys and live content for full public site functionality.

open_interfaces.interface: Temporary mock data source for theories pages. To be replaced with Ghost Content API calls.
